name: Black Cherry Jello Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can pitted dark sweet cherries (1 lb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve jello, sugar and salt in boiling water.
2. Drain cherries, measuring syrup; add water to make 3/4 cup.
3. Add syrup and lemon juice to jello mixture.
4. Chill until very thick.
5. Fold half the cherries into 1 cup jello mixture.
6. Pour into large mold and chill until set but not firm.
7. Whip remaining jello until fluffy.
8. Fold in whipped cream, remaining cherries and marshmallows.
9. Spoon into mold and chill until firm.
10. Serve with Marshmallow-Mayonnaise topping: Blend 1/3 cup marshmallow cream into 2/3 cup mayonnaise, stirring until smooth.
